name: review-gate
trigger: Before non-trivial execution and before approval-zone actions.
remediation: Pause execution, request review, or reduce the slice until it fits `always_proceed`.
limitations: Cannot summon real human review by itself.
The runner gates on `JAC_REVIEW_OK`; it does not verify a separate review artifact.
fallback_behavior: Use `docs/jack/workflows/plan-review.md` and task-scoped review comments manually.
